prose:
Calculation summary (method-provenance block)
Property: HOMO–LUMO (frontier-orbital) gap of TEMPO, units eV.
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier ‘standard’, density-fitted) in PySCF.
Geometry provenance: fixed input geometry from /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz; single-point only (no re-optimization) – notation B3LYP/def2-TZVP//input-XYZ.
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit or explicit solvation).
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 2 (open-shell doublet; UKS).
Software: PySCF backend via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill.
Convergence & caveats: SCF converged in 12 cycles; no warnings reported by the engine; integrity.status = ok, trustworthy = true.

Headline numerical results
• HOMO = −6.3375439 eV
• LUMO = −2.4651235 eV
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 3.8724203 eV  ← reported value
Additional Koopmans estimates: vertical IP = 6.3375439 eV, vertical EA = 2.4651235 eV, electronegativity = 4.4013337 eV, chemical hardness = 1.9362102 eV.

Reproducibility notes
Command executed (from result JSON `cli_invocation`):
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 2 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpi3t63stz/live.json

The live engine log was streamed to the standard chemkit `<skill>_<timestamp>.out` file in the working directory while the run executed; please consult that file for full SCF details and step-by-step output. No warnings were issued by the backend (`warnings` array empty).
